   But in the statement, we have `Vector.map (expr.eval env) (Vector.mapFinRange n (fun i => get input_var (i + Fin.ofNat n r)))`, and by `h_env`, `expr.eval env (get input_var (i + Fin.ofNat n r)) = env.get (i‚ÇÄ + i.val)` (if `i : Fin n`).
